generated_oml:
instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor defined in BIM to provide post-occupancy lighting data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor defined in BIM to provide post-occupancy temperature data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor defined in BIM to provide post-occupancy occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data from lighting sensor, transmitted via MQTT to Hono."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data from temperature sensor, transmitted via MQTT to Hono."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancySensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data from occupancy sensor, transmitted via MQTT to Hono."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM IFC model enriched with device metadata."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance RuntimeEntityGraphModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime entity graph derived from Eclipse Ditto, representing digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic model for lighting actuation derived from BIM."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata describing each sensor device, used for device modeling in Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ReinforcementLearningParams : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Parameters of the reinforcement learning controller for lighting policy improvement."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono mediates MQTT telemetry ingestion from the PT to the DT."
]
 
instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto manages entity graphs and device information for the DT."
]
 
instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine5 renders immersive visualizations of the building model."
]
 
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering pipeline validates and deploys device models and control logic."
]
 
instance IFCBasedBIMModels : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tooling to enrich BIM IFC models with device metadata."
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring dashboards for sensor telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates predictive analytics insights from historical sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance OptimizationLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes lighting control schedules based on sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements reinforcement learning to improve lighting control policies."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyImprovementAction
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive visualization of the building and its virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight dashboard displaying current sensor telemetry."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on predicted future energy usage and maintenance needs."
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on control schedules."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of lighting control policies via reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling immersive visualization in Unreal Engine5."
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting actuator deployed via Building Control System, controlled by DT."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator for temperature control, connected to the DT."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT (e.g., lighting setpoints, HVAC schedules) are sent back to the PT through the same Hono/Ditto middleware, allowing bidirectional communication with the building’s control system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data ingestion and command propagation occur in real‑time (sub‑second to second latency) while higher‑level optimization and simulation tasks run on a longer timescale (minutes to hourly)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "centralized orchestration of the BIM semantic backbone, middleware (Hono/Ditto), rendering engine (Unreal), and custom services integrated via modular extension points"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT lifecycle covers the design‑time phase (BIM model creation), the manufacturing/installation phase (device configuration and middleware deployment), and the operational phase (ongoing data exchange, analytics, and control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity is assessed through the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which evaluates the quantitative alignment between PT and DT data streams, model consistency, and semantic congruence, providing validation checkpoints and uncertainty quantification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication relies on MQTT (over TLS) via Eclipse Hono brokers, with Ditto’s REST/WS endpoints consuming and publishing JSON payloads; session persistence and QoS levels are configured to ensure reliable data transfer between PT and DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital twin services are deployed in a cloud‑native environment (e.g., Kubernetes on a public cloud), with micro‑service containers for Hono, Ditto, and the custom analytics services, orchestrated by a central DT framework hosted on the same platform."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with building information modeling (BIM) standards (IFC schema), adherence to MQTT‑based IoT standards via Eclipse Hono, and JSON schema validation within Ditto; the framework also follows model‑driven engineering best practices."
]
